title: Republic v. Job Kipkorir Arap Chumba
excerpt: Application for pretrial release of the accused person charged with murder contrary to Section 203 as read with Section 204 of the Penal Code.

title: Safaricom PLC v. Commissioner of Domestic Taxes
excerpt: Tax dispute concerning withholding tax on mobile money transfer services and the interpretation of Section 35(3) of the Income Tax Act.

title: Okiya Omtatah Okoiti v. Attorney General
excerpt: Public interest litigation challenging the constitutionality of the Finance Act 2023 amendments to the tax legislation.

title: Kenya National Commission on Human Rights v. Attorney General
excerpt: Advisory opinion on the rights of suspects in police custody and the constitutionality of police detention without trial.

title: Centre for Rights Education and Awareness v. Attorney General
excerpt: Constitutional petition challenging discriminatory provisions in the Succession Act as they affect widows and female children.

title: British American Tobacco v. Cabinet Secretary for the National Treasury
excerpt: Challenge to the Public Health Act amendments imposing plain packaging requirements on tobacco products.

title: Federation of Women Lawyers Kenya v. Attorney General
excerpt: Constitutional challenge to provisions of the Marriage Act that permitted child marriage with parental consent.

title: Katiba Institute v. Attorney General
excerpt: Challenge to the appointment of Principal Secretaries without public participation and parliamentary vetting as required by the Constitution.

title: Mathew Mwangi Mutiso v. IEBC
excerpt: Election petition challenging the results of the gubernatorial election in Kiambu County for alleged irregularities and voter suppression.

title: Doctors for Life International v. Speaker of the National Assembly
excerpt: Landmark case on the doctrine of separation of powers and the role of the judiciary in reviewing legislative and executive action.

title: Standard Chartered Bank v. Kenya Revenue Authority
excerpt: Dispute over the assessment of corporation tax on foreign-sourced income and the application of double taxation agreements.

title: Wiper Democratic Movement v. Jubilee Party
excerpt: Dispute arising from a coalition agreement and the allocation of party tickets for the 2022 general elections.

title: Republic v. Chief Magistrate's Court at Milimani
excerpt: Judicial review application seeking orders of certiorari to quash a decision of the Chief Magistrate's Court in a land dispute.

title: Nairobi City County v. Attorney General
excerpt: Constitutional dispute over the division of revenue between the national government and Nairobi City County Government.

title: Kenya Railways Corporation v. Federation of Kenya Employers
excerpt: Labour dispute concerning the retrenchment of employees during the restructuring of Kenya Railways Corporation.

title: Societe Internationale de Telecommunications Aeronautiques v. Kenya Revenue Authority
excerpt: Dispute on whether the provision of aeronautical telecommunications services constitutes a taxable supply under the VAT Act.

title: Mombasa Cement Ltd v. County Government of Mombasa
excerpt: Challenge to county government levies on industrial operations and the constitutional limits of county taxation powers.

title: Oxygen House Limited v. Attorney General
excerpt: Constitutional petition challenging the constitutionality of the Environmental Management and Coordination Act provisions on waste disposal.

title: Maurice Onyango Oluoch v. Nairobi City Water & Sewerage Company
excerpt: Class action suit against Nairobi City Water & Sewerage Company for chronic water shortages and illegal disconnections.

title: Communications Authority of Kenya v. Kenya Human Rights Commission
excerpt: Dispute over the constitutionality of government surveillance powers under the National Intelligence Service Act.

title: Kenya Airports Authority v. KAA Workers Union
excerpt: Labour dispute arising from the privatization of JKIA operations and its effect on employee terms and conditions.
